Built in a redevelopment area where the focal point is the big convention center, this big city park has been a welcome addition to a very crowded part of the city.  The landscaping is mature and there are places to sit with your picnic lunch.  Lots of tall modern buildings around.

This park is extremely clean and pleasant. With various sculptures and many plants, this park is nice to walk or stand still in it. There are days with live music and there are several gastronomic options around.
